kpis.title: KPIs
kpis.subtitle: Ticket metrics at a glance.
kpis.statusDescriptionGlobal: Current breakdown of all tickets in the system.
kpis.statusDescriptionScoped: Current breakdown of tickets in your projects.
kpis.trendDescriptionGlobal: New tickets per day over the last 30 days across the system.
kpis.trendDescriptionScoped: New tickets per day over the last 30 days in your projects.
kpis.projectsDescriptionGlobal: Status counts for every company and project in the system.
kpis.projectsDescriptionScoped: Status counts for the companies and projects you belong to.
kpis.projectsEmpty: No ticket data to show for your projects.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: All registered users and their roles.
users.name: Name

details.title: User details
details.hint: Double-click a row to see full details.

form.description: Accounts that can sign in to the workspace.
form.name: Name
form.adminHint: Full access to every company and all management.
form.adminLocked: The default admin can't be demoted.
form.dashboardHint: Allow this user to open the staff dashboard.
form.imageHint: Drag & drop an image here, or click to browse
form.imageTypes: PNG, JPG, WEBP or GIF · up to 5 MB
form.passwordHint: Leave blank to keep the current password.

disableConfirm.disableDescription: {name} will no longer be able to sign in. You can re-enable them later.
disableConfirm.enableDescription: {name} will be able to sign in again.

teamMembers.title: Team Members
teamMembers.subtitle: Choose which users appear in the landing page team section.
teamMembers.name: Name

form.description: Feature an existing user in their company's landing page team.
form.noCandidates: All users are already on the team.

removeConfirm.title: Remove from team
removeConfirm.description: This removes {name} from the landing page team. Their account is not affected.

partners.title: Partners
partners.subtitle: Manage the partners shown on the landing page.
partners.name: Name

form.description: Details shown in the public partners section.
form.name: Name
form.companiesHint: The partner appears on the landing page of each selected company.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete partner
deleteConfirm.description: This removes {name} from the partners list. This cannot be undone.

companies.title: Companies
companies.subtitle: Manage the companies that own projects.
companies.name: Name

form.description: Companies that own projects in the workspace.
form.name: Name
form.nameLocked: This company's name can't be changed.
form.logoHint: Drag & drop an image here, or click to browse
form.logoTypes: PNG, JPG, WEBP or GIF · up to 5 MB

deleteConfirm.title: Delete company
deleteConfirm.description: This removes {name} and all of its projects. This cannot be undone.

form.formDescription: Track an issue and route it to the right engineers.
form.subject: Subject
form.descPlaceholder: Describe the issue and any relevant context.

assignDialog.title: Assign staff
assignDialog.description: Choose one or more engineers or consultants to handle this ticket.

statusDialog.title: Change status
statusDialog.description: Set the ticket to open, in progress, or closed.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete ticket
deleteConfirm.description: This removes “{title}”. This cannot be undone.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Manage projects, assign a manager, and add reviewers and consultants.
projects.name: Name

form.description: Projects belong to a company and can have a manager.
form.name: Name

members.title: Members of {name}
members.description: Reviewers and consultants assigned to this project.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete project
deleteConfirm.description: This removes {name} and its memberships. This cannot be undone.

complaints.heading: Complaints
complaints.subtitle: Issues reporters raised about how their tickets were handled.
complaints.author: Reported by

suggestions.heading: Suggestions
suggestions.subtitle: Improvement ideas submitted by the team.
suggestions.title: Submit a suggestion
suggestions.description: Share an idea to improve the system.
suggestions.attachmentsHint: Drag & drop images here, or click to browse
suggestions.attachmentsTypes: PNG, JPG, WebP or GIF · up to 5 MB each
suggestions.author: Author

deleteConfirm.title: Delete suggestion
deleteConfirm.description: This permanently removes “{title}” and its replies. This cannot be undone.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete reply
deleteConfirm.description: This removes the reply (and any replies to it). This cannot be undone.

ticketCreated.title: New ticket: {title}
ticketCreated.details: A reporter filed a new ticket: {title}

ticketReply.title: {name} replied on ticket #{id}
ticketReply.details: {name} posted a new message on ticket #{id}

ticketAssignedToYou.title: You were assigned to ticket #{id}
ticketAssignedToYou.details: You have been assigned to work on ticket #{id}

ticketReportSubmitted.title: New report on ticket #{id}
ticketReportSubmitted.details: An engineer or consultant submitted a diagnostic report on ticket #{id}

ticketReportReply.title: New reply on a report (ticket #{id})
ticketReportReply.details: Someone replied to a diagnostic report on ticket #{id}

complaintSubmitted.title: New complaint on ticket #{id}
complaintSubmitted.details: A reporter filed a complaint about ticket #{id}

suggestionCreated.title: New suggestion: {title}
suggestionCreated.details: A user submitted a new suggestion: {title}
